since_last: 49% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +3.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.48% · BTC +0.26% · Gold +1.08% · Nasdaq100 -1.35%. 49% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +3.03%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +3.03%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -8.73%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +5.74%, WDAY +4.00%, MDB +3.91%, SAP +3.78%, INTU +3.76%. Laggards: TER -8.73%, HPE -6.49%, LRCX -5.72%, AMAT -5.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.39% at $149.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.39% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
